system.powerDescription:
You have always got an exit plan. You reveal an escape route you've set-up to flee this exact situation. You rapidly travel to any point you have already been within CAT+1 range. When you use this power roll PSYCHE, you may then pick one of the following bonuses per success. 

• You may take CAT allies in the scene with you. 
• You may take one object of up to CAT size in the scene that you are not currently holding with you. 
• You may vanish without a trace, your escape being impossible to track.
